model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: TheLastBen/Papercut_SDXL (fast-stable-diffusion SDXL trainer). creativeml-openrail-m license. ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

generation._hint: 30–50 steps. 30 is sufficient for LoRA styles. | CFG 7.5 is a safe SDXL default. | SDXL native 1024×1024.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates decorative paper-cut (scherenschnitt) style illustrations — intricate layered silhouettes, folk-art inspired compositions, and the handcrafted aesthetic of paper collage.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: prepend 'papercut' before the subject. Format: 'papercut <subject>'. Examples: 'papercut forest with deer', 'papercut cat on a windowsill', 'papercut cityscape at night'.
